scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/auth-provider build && bun run --cwd packages/react build && bun run --cwd packages/node build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/auth-provider test && bun run --cwd packages/react test && bun run --cwd packages/node test
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/auth-provider lint && bun run --cwd packages/react lint && bun run --cwd packages/node lint
